name: prompt-submit-inject-rule
description: When the user's prompt mentions a rule ID (e.g. ORD-CALC-007), inject the rule's full YAML into the context so the agent doesn't have to look it up.

script: # This hook runs as a small script that scans the prompt for rule IDs
# matching the pattern <DOMAIN>-<KIND>-<NUM>, looks them up in rules/,
# and prepends matching YAML blocks to the context.
# Adapt to your Kiro version's script-hook API. Pseudocode:
action.label: rule-context

notes: Saves the agent from re-reading catalog files when a rule is mentioned.
If the pattern matches an ID that doesn't exist in the catalog, the hook
should silently skip rather than block the prompt.
